summary: Iteration 23 - AI Commentary & LiveTab Major Upgrade Testing Complete. 13/14 backend tests passed (1 skipped due to no leaderboard entries). Frontend verified: Dual points banner with gradient animations, Match cards with team logos, Match Detail hero with team card image backgrounds, 5-tab navigation, LiveTab with 3 sub-tabs (Match Story/Moments/Stars), structured AI commentary with Hinglish content, CSS animations for cricket events.

backend.ai_commentary_endpoint: PASS - Returns structured JSON with match_pulse, key_moments, star_performers, turning_point, verdict
backend.ai_commentary_structured_data: PASS - All fields present: headline, sub, team scores, event types, ratings
backend.scorecard_endpoint: PASS - Returns innings data with batting/bowling
backend.match_info_endpoint: PASS - Returns match details, toss, venue
backend.live_score_data: PASS - Scores use r/w/o keys correctly

frontend.homepage_dual_banner: PASS - Fantasy Points (green) and Contest Coins (gold) banners with animate-gradient-shift
frontend.homepage_live_ticker: PASS - IPL LIVE ticker with team logos (KKR, PBKS, CSK, RCBW)
frontend.homepage_match_cards: PASS - Match cards with team logos and team card image backgrounds
frontend.homepage_ipl_standings: PASS - IPL 2026 Standings table with team logos
frontend.match_detail_hero: PASS - Team card image background, glass morphism, team logos, scores
frontend.match_detail_5_tabs: PASS - Contests, Live, Scorecard, Squad, Fantasy Pts tabs
frontend.live_tab_3_subtabs: PASS - Match Story, Moments (15), Stars sub-tabs
frontend.live_tab_match_pulse: PASS - Match Pulse card with Hinglish headline: 'Wankhede mein Rohit-Rickelton ka toofan!'
frontend.live_tab_key_moments: PASS - 5 story moments with event badges (SIX/FOUR/WICKET/MILESTONE)
frontend.moments_subtab: PASS - 15 moment cards with event type badges and over numbers
frontend.stars_subtab: PASS - 5 star performers with gold/silver styling, ratings (9.6, 9.4), rating bars
frontend.scorecard_tab: PASS - Match result, innings scores, sixes/fours count, top scorer, best bowler
frontend.score_display_format: PASS - Handles both r/w/o and runs/wickets/overs API formats
frontend.css_animations: PASS - animate-six, animate-four, animate-wicket, animate-milestone, animate-gradient-shift, animate-live-pulse all present

critical_code_review_comments: ai_commentary.py: Excellent structured output with GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM - returns match_pulse, key_moments, star_performers, turning_point, verdict
ai_commentary.py: Good fallback logic when AI fails - generates commentary from raw scorecard data
MatchDetailPage.jsx: LiveTab properly handles 3 sub-tabs with smooth animations
MatchDetailPage.jsx: Event badges (SIX/FOUR/WICKET/MILESTONE) with correct colors and animations
HomePage.jsx: MatchCard correctly handles both r/w/o and runs/wickets/overs score formats
ShareCard.jsx: Properly implemented with team logos, rank styling, WhatsApp share button
App.css: All cricket event animations (sixGlow, fourWave, wicketShake, milestoneGlow) properly defined
seed_data_creation: None - using existing KKR vs MI completed match (e06a8963-410c-4901-bb96-807a3f258fe3)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 verified the major AI Commentary upgrade. Key findings: (1) AI Commentary endpoint returns structured JSON with Hinglish content from GPT-5.2, (2) LiveTab has 3 sub-tabs (Match Story/Moments/Stars) with proper animations, (3) Event badges (SIX/FOUR/WICKET/MILESTONE) display correctly with colors and animations, (4) Star performers show with gold/silver styling and rating bars, (5) Score display handles both r/w/o and runs/wickets/overs formats, (6) ShareCard component exists but couldn't test fully due to no leaderboard entries. Use KKR vs MI match (id: e06a8963-410c-4901-bb96-807a3f258fe3) for AI commentary testing.
